#set page(margin: 1in)

#align(center, [
  #text(size: 1.44em, weight: "bold")[The Hausdorff dimension of the boundary of the Mandelbrot set and Julia sets]
  #v(1em)
  Source-backed arXiv sample
  #v(1em)
])

= Figure Captions

#figure(
  rect(width: 78%, height: 1.15in, stroke: 0.5pt),
  caption: [Figure 5\} Gluing these two curves of $S_0^-$ (resp. $S_0^+$), one obtains a topological cylinder $C_0^-$ (resp. $C_0^+$), called the _outgoing_],
  supplement: [Figure]
) <fig:source-1>

#figure(
  rect(width: 78%, height: 1.15in, stroke: 0.5pt),
  caption: [Figure 7\} Now let us consider the following sequence of maps: $U_i arrow.r.long^(t_0^(-1))$],
  supplement: [Figure]
) <fig:source-2>

#figure(
  rect(width: 78%, height: 1.15in, stroke: 0.5pt),
  caption: [Figure 8\} To analyze the bifurcation, we need to consider $q$ incoming and $q$ outgoing Ecalle cylinders $C_0^(k,+)$],
  supplement: [Figure]
) <fig:source-3>

Figures @fig:source-1 through @fig:source-3 preserve source-backed captions while replacing external graphics with deterministic placeholders.
